expectations.evidence: PMID 30910320 appears in title, study details table, and verification note.

expectations.text: Report includes at least one author name from the paper
expectations.evidence: Full 15-author list: 'Villanueva C, Albillos A, Genesca J, Garcia-Pagan JC, Calleja JL, Aracil C, Banares R, Morillas RM, Poca M, Penas B, Augustin S, Abraldes JG, Alvarado E, Torres F, Bosch J.'
'Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multicentre trial' — plus details: 8 hospitals Spain, NCT01059396.

expectations.text: Report is concise, does NOT contain multi-leg comparative table
expectations.evidence: Report is 51 lines. Focused on single PMID verification. No comparative table, no multi-leg structure. Clean fast-path routing.

expectations.text: Report includes primary endpoint result with effect size
